series_metadata.series_description: License applications as a MF Dealer, MF Information Update, Permissive MF Dealer, Retail MF Dealer, MF Exporter type A or B, MF Exporter type A or B Terminal Operator, Terminal Operator update and a Transporter or Motor Fuel. Forms include: MF201, MF201A, MF202, MF203, MF204, MF204A, MF205, MF205A

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: end of calendar year in which application was cancelled ; Electronic: end of calendar year in which application was cancelled
